creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of audio/wmmp3

 diff -urN audio/wmmp3/pkg/DESCR.orig audio/wmmp3/pkg/DESCR
--- audio/wmmp3/pkg/DESCR.orig  Thu Jan 20 13:58:38 2000
+++ audio/wmmp3/pkg/DESCR       Thu Jan 20 13:58:59 2000
@@ -2,3 +2,5 @@
 dockapp.
 
 - Jim <jim@FreeBSD.org>
+
+WWW: http://www.dotfiles.com/software/wmmp3/
